title: polylepis besseri subsp. subtusalbida
intro: Polylepis besseri subsp. subtusalbida is a plant species within the Polylepis genus, commonly found in the Andean region, particularly in Peru and Bolivia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its ability to treat various health issues. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Polylepis besseri subsp. subtusalbida include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
